description: Credit-equity (HYG vs SPY) paired-divergence engine with LQD+EMB confirmation. 20d return spread, 252d z-score, 3-day persistence filter. Triggers CREDIT_BEAR (z<=-1.5, equity vulnerable) or CREDIT_BULL (z>=+1.5, equity bullish). Edge basis: Gilchrist-Zakrajsek 2012. +5% BULL / -7% BEAR / 4-8 wks. Daily 21 UTC.
